special_mechanics.name: Newtonian Physics Flight Model
special_mechanics.description: Spacecraft control based rigidly on Newtonian physics. Momentum must be neutralised to bring craft to stop. Turning 180° has no effect on direction of travel until previous momentum is counteracted.

special_mechanics.name: Acceleration Capability
special_mechanics.description: Fastest ships capable of more than 10G of acceleration for intrasystem travel

special_mechanics.name: Time Acceleration
special_mechanics.description: Game provides accelerated time function for long intrasystem journeys: 10x, 100x, 1000x, or 10,000x normal speed

special_mechanics.name: Hyperdrive Travel
special_mechanics.description: Interstellar travel between star systems. Maximum range calculated by ship mass. Time for maximum range jump is always exactly one week.

tier_notes: Tier 2: Space flight simulator with documented qualitative physics descriptions. No specific numerical gravity, jump, or movement parameters available. Game focuses on Newtonian physics simulation for spacecraft rather than platformer-style player movement metrics.
